title: Identity operators should not be used with dissimilar types
description: This rule checks for the use of identity operators (==, !=, is, is not) with dissimilar types, which can lead to unexpected behavior.
message: Identity operator used with dissimilar types
recommendation: Use appropriate comparison operators for the types involved

noncompliant.description: Comparing an integer and a string with the identity operator

compliant.description: Comparing an integer and a string using appropriate comparison operators

why_is_this_an_issue: Identity operators can lead to unexpected behavior when compared with dissimilar types.
how_to_fix: Use appropriate comparison operators for the types involved.

metadata.title: Identity operators should not be used with dissimilar types
